verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Bride, do you remember Way back to your former rain When you once stood in position Having dominion And all things under your feet But you fell, you fell from that fellowship And you wondered where you went wrong So you cry out, you thirst for that latter rain And you'll fight for that power again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You see the palmerworm Came in your life and ate Then the cankerworm Came in your life and ate Then the caterpillar and locust ate But God promised, yes, He promised

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: "I will restore," saith the Lord "I will restore," saith the Lord Jehovah promised a Holy Ghost promise "I will restore," thus saith the Lord "I will restore," thus saith the Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: "Power shall come from on high After the Holy Ghost comes upon you You shall be witnesses to Me Throughout the world For My glory shall all men behold For I shall come unto you as the former rain As the latter rain to you shall I come And all men will testify That you have the evidence That Jesus rose from the dead"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And in your own atmosphere God will visit you there For you were meant to be Mighty men of valour And He promised…
